title: Bible Verses x MC Music
description: Adds Bible verses to various tracks from the game!
body:
I was inspired to make this after seeing so many videos combining Bible verses and Minecraft Music. Some of these are from those videos (with creator permission), some are inspired by those videos, and others I made on my own.


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

Big thank you to Lloyds Chill for allowing me to use a couple of his videos! {

Psalm 34 x Moog City 2 was taken from [https://youtu.be/AHQ-HaNqhAc?si=8c-d1q6aDUJGXoFX](https://youtu.be/AHQ-HaNqhAc?si=8c-d1q6aDUJGXoFX)

Matthew 14:25-33 was taken from [https://youtu.be/bjeeeg9aCHw?si=-vvBhdiHx74ST_w2](https://youtu.be/bjeeeg9aCHw?si=-vvBhdiHx74ST_w2)

}

Psalm 102 x Mice on Venus was inspired by [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FJhQeaKQ5ZY](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FJhQeaKQ5ZY)

Ecclesiastes 3 x Alpha was inspired by [https://youtu.be/R3TeNHkkRiQ?si=EQjOluAs4niHgt8L](https://youtu.be/R3TeNHkkRiQ?si=EQjOluAs4niHgt8L)

Psalm 91 X Living Mice is my original creation.

</details>
